reviews.comment:
Muy lindo. Exclusivo para socios e invitados. Muy bien cuidado y mantenido. Grandes árboles con mucha sombra. Ideal para ir con la familia y chicos.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice. Exclusive for members and their guests. Very well cared for and maintained. Large trees providing plenty of shade. Ideal for going with family and children.

reviews.comment:
Mala atencion en los servicios que no son carga de combustible. Cuando uno para para pedir agua caliente para mate no tienen monedas y no facilitan dentro del local. Le falta mantenimiento.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service for services other than refueling. When you stop to ask for hot water for mate, they don't have coins and don't provide them inside. It needs maintenance.

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, rápida atención. Tiene alguna restricción después de 22hs por seguridad. Pero atienden muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, prompt attention. There are some restrictions after 10 p.m. for security reasons. But they provide very good service.
